_meta.description: Picks which resume to score a job against based on title/JD keywords. Falls back to default_resume if no rule matches.
_meta.rule_order: first match wins; rules evaluated top-down

_meta: Routing rules are advisory only as of the dual-résumé match.py — match.py sends BOTH résumés to the LLM and lets it pick. These rules are kept as a fallback / for documentation / for any future single-résumé-per-job mode.

rules.name: Payments / fintech roles → Digital Payments résumé
AI / LLM / GenAI roles → AI-first résumé
